service.description: Type of appointment being booked. Must match the service used in check_available_slots.

start_time.description: Appointment start time in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset, for example 2026-04-03T10:00:00+02:00.

customer_name.description: Full name of the patient who is booking the appointment.

customer_phone.description: Patient phone number in international format when available.

notes.description: Optional booking notes or extra context from the caller.
